name: revit_hide_category_in_all_views
description: Hide the category of a picked element in every view of the active project.

element_id.description: Element id used to resolve the category to hide (replaces interactive pick)

category_id.description: Category id to hide directly (alternative to element_id)

notes: Interactive pick selects the category. Some view types skip SetCategoryHidden with ArgumentException; results are summarized in a TaskDialog.
